zh.lifeSummary: 當Mathilde de Châteaudun於大約1080年出生在法國崔艾-吉洛易a奧度時，她的父親Hugh IV Viscount of Châteaudun40歲，母親Agnes de Fréteval16歲。她於大約1100年與Vicomte Robert I de Blois在法國結婚。她去世於1130年9月25日在法國阿奎泰洛吉吉加洛卡瑟易爾享年51歲，埋葬在法國崔艾-吉洛易哈特雷斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mathilde de Châteaudun于大约1080年出生在法国崔艾-吉洛易a奧度时，她的父亲Hugh IV Viscount of Châteaudun40岁，母亲Agnes de Fréteval16岁。她于大约1100年与Vicomte Robert I de Blois在法国结婚。她去世于1130年9月25日在法国阿奎泰洛吉吉加洛卡瑟易爾享年51岁，埋葬在法国崔艾-吉洛易哈特雷斯。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Mathilde
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Matilda
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Mathilde de Châteaudun was born about 1080, in Châteaudun, Eure-et-Loir, Centre, France, her father, Hugh IV Viscount of Châteaudun, was 40 and her mother, Agnes de Fréteval, was 16. She married Vicomte Robert I de Blois about 1100, in France. She died on 25 September 1130, in Casseneuil, Lot-et-Garonne, Aquitaine, France, at the age of 51, and was buried in Chartres, Eure-et-Loir, Centre, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mathilde de Châteaudun est née environ 1080, à Châteaudun, Eure-et-Loir, Centre, France, son père, Hugh IV Viscount of Châteaudun, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Agnes de Fréteval, avait 16 ans. Elle a épousé Vicomte Robert I de Blois environ 1100, à France. Elle est décédée le 25 septembre 1130, à Casseneuil, Lot-et-Garonne, Aquitaine, France, à l’âge de 51 ans, et a été enterrée à Chartres, Eure-et-Loir, Centre, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mathilde de Châteaudun um 1080 in Châteaudun, Eure-et-Loir, Centre, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Hugh IV Viscount of Châteaudun 40 und ihre Mutter Agnes de Fréteval 16. Sie hat um 1100 in Frankreich Vicomte Robert I de Blois geheiratet. Sie starb am 25. September 1130 im Alter von 51 Jahren in Casseneuil, Lot-et-Garonne, Aquitaine, Frankreich und wurde in Chartres, Eure-et-Loir, Centre, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mathilde de Châteaudun è nata il circa 1080 nel Châteaudun, Eure-et-Loir, Centre, Francia, sua padre, Hugh IV Viscount of Châteaudun, aveva 40 anni e sua madre, Agnes de Fréteval, aveva 16 anni. Lei sposato Vicomte Robert I de Blois circa 1100, nel Francia. Morì il 25 settembre 1130, nel Casseneuil, Lot-et-Garonne, Aquitaine, Francia, all'età di 51 anni, e fu sepolta a Chartres, Eure-et-Loir, Centre, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Mathilde de Châteaudunが約1080年にフランスセントアエウレ-エト-ロイルチaテアウダンで生まれた時，父Hugh IV Viscount of Châteaudunは40歳，母Agnes de Frétevalは16歳であった。約1100年にフランスでVicomte Robert I de Bloisと結婚した。彼女は1130年9月25日にフランスアクイティアインロト-エト-ガーオンカセンエウイルで51歳で死去し，フランスセントアエウレ-エト-ロイルチャートレスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Mathilde de Châteaudun(이)가 대략 1080년 프랑스 세트르 우레-트-로이르 cha테오던에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Hugh IV Viscount of Châteaudun(은)는 40세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes de Fréteval(은)는 16세였다. 그녀는 대략 1100년 프랑스에서 Vicomte Robert I de Blois(와)과 결혼했다. 그녀는 1130년 9월 25일 프랑스 아키테인 로트-트-가니 캐센우일에서 51세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 세트르 우레-트-로이르 처트레스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mathilde de Châteaudun nasceu aproximadamente 1080, em Châteaudun, Eure-et-Loir, Centre, França, seu pai, Hugh IV Viscount of Châteaudun, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Agnes de Fréteval, tinha 16 anos. Ela casou-se com Vicomte Robert I de Blois aproximadamente 1100, em França. Ela faleceu em 25 de setembro de 1130, em Casseneuil, Lot-et-Garonne, Aquitaine, França, com 51 anos, e foi sepultada em Chartres, Eure-et-Loir, Centre, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mathilde de Châteaudun родилась около 1080 г. в местности чaтодун, эуре-ет-лоир, кентр, Франция, её отцу по имени Hugh IV Viscount of Châteaudun было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes de Fréteval, 16. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Vicomte Robert I de Blois около 1100 г. в местности Франция. Она умерла 25 сентября 1130 г. в местности кассинеуил, лот-ет-гаронн, аквитеин, Франция в возрасте 51 год и была похоронена в местности чартресь, эуре-ет-лоир, кентр, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mathilde de Châteaudun nació aproximadamente 1080, en Châteaudun, Eure-et-Loir, Centre, Francia, su papá, Hugh IV Viscount of Châteaudun, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Agnes de Fréteval, tenía 16 años. Se casó con Vicomte Robert I de Blois aproximadamente 1100, en Francia. Murió el 25 de septiembre de 1130, en Casseneuil, Lot-et-Garonne, Aquitaine, Francia, a la edad de 51 años, y fue sepultada en Chartres, Eure-et-Loir, Centre, Francia.
